mapper.update: UPDATE seat SET `status` = 'AVAILABLE', `version` = `version` + 1, `heldAt` = NULL WHERE `status` = 'PENDING' AND `heldAt` < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 MINUTE)
mapper.select: SELECT S.*, SG.name AS extra__gradeName, SG.price AS extra__price FROM seat AS S INNER JOIN seatGrade AS SG ON S.gradeId = SG.id WHERE S.scheduleId = #{scheduleId}

SELECT r.*, c.title AS extra__concertTitle, s.performDate AS extra__concertDate, seat.rowName AS extra__rowName, seat.colNumber AS extra__colNumber, g.name AS extra__gradeName, g.price AS extra__price, s.concertId AS extra__masterConcertId FROM reservation AS r INNER JOIN seat AS seat ON r.seatId = seat.id INNER JOIN `schedule` AS s ON r.scheduleId = s.id INNER JOIN concert AS c ON s.concertId = c.id INNER JOIN seatGrade AS g ON seat.gradeId = g.id WHERE r.memberId = #{memberId} ORDER BY r.id DESC

SELECT S.*, SG.name AS extra__gradeName, SG.price AS extra__price FROM seat AS S INNER JOIN seatGrade AS SG ON S.gradeId = SG.id WHERE S.id IN
#{id}

SELECT s.*, c.title AS extra__concertTitle, c.posterImg AS extra__posterImg, c.bookingStartAt AS extra__bookingStartAt FROM `schedule` s INNER JOIN concert c ON s.concertId = c.id WHERE s.id = #{scheduleId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE seat SET `status` = 'PENDING', `version` = `version` + 1, `memberId` = #{memberId}, `heldAt` = NOW() WHERE scheduleId = #{scheduleId} AND ( `status` = 'AVAILABLE' OR (`status` = 'PENDING' AND `memberId` = #{memberId}) ) AND (id, `version`) IN
(#{item.id}, #{item.version})
mapper.select: SELECT S.*, SG.price AS extra__price FROM seat AS S INNER JOIN seatGrade AS SG ON S.gradeId = SG.id WHERE S.id = #{seatId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation SET regDate = NOW(), updateDate = NOW(), memberId = #{memberId}, scheduleId = #{scheduleId}, seatId = #{seatId}, paidPrice = #{paidPrice}, `status` = 'CONFIRMED'
INSERT INTO `reservation` SET regDate = NOW(), updateDate = NOW(), memberId = #{memberId}, seatId = #{seatId}, paidPrice = #{paidPrice}, `status` = 'CONFIRMED'
mapper.update: UPDATE seat SET `status` = 'AVAILABLE', `memberId` = NULL, `heldAt` = NULL, `version` = `version` + 1 WHERE id = #{seatId} AND `status` = 'RESERVED'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE scheduleId = #{scheduleId} AND `status` = 'CONFIRMED'
